title: Spotify’s AI Remix Looks To Turn Fans Into Revenue
description: Spotify is testing a potentially lucrative idea that fans should not just stream songs, but also should remix them and pay for the privilege.

title: New AI Warning: Don’t Discuss Your Legal Problems With Claude Or ChatGPT
description: A new federal court ruling makes clear that business owners and executives can't expect confidentiality for legal discussions with AI, as they can with human attorneys.
